cards.title: Magnet Therapy
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • North pole (negative): Anti-inflammatory, calming
  • South pole (positive): Stimulating, warming
  • PEMF: Frequency 1–100 Hz, evidence in bone healing
  • Magnetic water: Preparation & clinical use
  • Contraindications: Pacemakers, implants, pregnancy
